Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Time of Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Accepted + Wait - Implementation Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + Closed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait - Implementation and Completed + Resolved
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time between Accepted + In Progress and Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Total time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation when it occurs in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation in variants that do not include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Total time of Accepted + Wait - Implementation across all variants where it directly precedes Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to Completed + Closed in variants starting with Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + In Progress and Accepted + Wait - Implementation in high-impact cases (impact = 'High')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Time of Accepted + Wait - Implementation when performed by resources in Brazil
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the end of the case

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - Implementation grouped by product
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and the end of case grouped by the last value of product

Name: Total time from Accepted + Wait - Implementation to the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait - Implementation and the final resolution (Completed + Closed) in variants containing only one waiting activity
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation compared to Accepted + Wait - User within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'
